pr.title: fix(deps): bump python-multipart from 0.0.20 to 0.0.27 (closes #92)
pr.body:
### SUMMARY

Bumps `python-multipart` from 0.0.20 to 0.0.27 to fix the following CVEs:

- **CVE-2026-40347** / **CVE-2026-42561** / **CVE-2026-24486** (HIGH severity)
- **OSV ID**: [GHSA-mj87-hwqh-73pj](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mj87-hwqh-73pj)
- **Summary**: python-multipart has Denial of Service via unbounded multipart part headers

`python-multipart` is a transitive dependency (via `mcp`). The version pin in `requirements/development.txt` was updated from `==0.0.20` to `==0.0.27`.

**Files changed:**
- `requirements/development.txt` — updated `python-multipart==0.0.20` → `python-multipart==0.0.27`

### BEFORE/AFTER SCREENSHOTS OR ANIMATED GIF
Not applicable — dependency version bump only.

### TESTING INSTRUCTIONS

1. `pip install -r requirements/development.txt --no-deps` — verify install completes
2. `pip show python-multipart` — confirm version is 0.0.27
3. `pytest tests/unit_tests/ -x -q` — verify all unit tests pass

**Unit test output (actual):**
```
7008 passed, 4 skipped, 2 deselected in 368.29s (0:06:08)
```
All 7008 unit tests pass. The 2 deselected tests are **pre-existing failures on master** unrelated to this change (both are `PlaywrightTimeout` constructor issues in `test_screenshot_utils.py` and `webdriver_test.py`).

**Integration test output (actual):**
```
ERROR tests/integration_tests/access_tests.py::test_get_user_id[None-None]
1 skipped, 1 error in 5.19s
```
Integration tests fail at setup with a **pre-existing** SQLite schema error (`no such table: css_templates`). This error reproduces identically on the `master` branch without any changes, confirming it is not caused by this bump. Integration tests require a fully migrated database (`superset db upgrade`) which is not available in the local test environment.

### ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
- [x] Has associated issue: Fixes #92
- [ ] Required feature flags:
- [ ] Changes UI
- [ ] Includes DB Migration
- [ ] Introduces new feature or API
- [ ] Removes existing feature or API

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/733034e2c6d74bc59d572e4d5b22695a
